notes: Used with construction_name and category to group layer rows into one construction. Not written directly to CDT when construction_name is the target name.
Target DesignBuilder construction name. Trim whitespace. Must not contain # because CDT uses # as delimiter.
Mapped to DesignBuilder CategoryId: External Wall=1; Internal Partition=2; Ground Floor=12; Door=9.
Layer sequence inside each grouped construction. Current CDT reference has 20 Mat/Thick slots.
Logical material name. Must exist in the material catalogs configured by workspace_rules.json.

default_value_or_rule: use material default thickness when blank
notes: Optional layer thickness in meters. Leave blank to use default thickness from material source.
Copied to DesignBuilder Description from the first non-empty note in each construction group. # is replaced by space before CDT generation.
